ham.subject: Updated Company Leave Policy Effective July 1, 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

I hope this message finds you well. 

Please be advised that our company’s leave policy has been updated to reflect new statutory requirements and to better support work‑life balance for all employees. Effective July 1, 2026, the following changes will apply:

1. **Annual Leave** – All full‑time employees will receive 20 days of paid vacation per year. Part‑time employees will receive pro‑rated days based on hours worked.
2. **Sick Leave** – The sick leave entitlement has increased from 5 to 10 days per calendar year. Accrued unused sick days will not carry over beyond December 31.
3. **Maternity/Paternity Leave** – Eligibility has been expanded to include all employees who have completed 12 months of continuous service.
4. **Unpaid Leave** – A new policy allows unpaid leave for up to 30 consecutive days, subject to manager approval and a written request.
5. **Leave Accrual** – Leave days will now accrue monthly, rather than annually, providing more flexibility for planning.

Please review the full policy document attached to this email for detailed information. If you have any questions or need clarification, feel free to contact HR at hr@example.com.

Thank you for your attention to these updates. 

Best regards,

Alexandra Martinez
HR Manager

spam.subject: Congratulations! You've Been Selected for a Full Scholarship at Greenfield University – Apply Now
spam.body:
Dear Prospective Scholar,

We are delighted to inform you that you have been shortlisted for a full‑scholarship award at Greenfield University for the academic year 2026‑2027. Our selection committee was impressed by your academic achievements and extracurricular involvement.

To secure your scholarship, we require a few essential details:

- Full name
- Date of birth
- Current address
- Parent/guardian contact information
- Highest grade level completed
- Standardized test scores

Please submit the requested information by **March 15, 2026** to avoid losing your place. Failure to act promptly may result in forfeiture of the scholarship.

For your convenience, you can complete the online application form here: <URL>

We look forward to welcoming you to the Greenfield community and supporting your academic journey.

Sincerely,

Dr. Jonathan Hale
Admissions Officer
Greenfield University

*This email is confidential. If you did not apply to Greenfield University, please disregard this message.*
